maay_maay.ap_physics_2_ray_diagrams_snell_s_law_: AP Physics 2: ray diagrams, Snell's law, mirrors, lenses, interference, diffraction, polarization. Sims dhinac-dhinac + calculators.
maay_maay.rainbows_mirages_after_images_color_po: Rainbows · mirages · after-images · color · polarized sky
maay_maay.50_optical_scientists_from_antiquity_t: 50+ optical scientists oo waqtigii hore ilaa maanta
maay_maay.lasers_vision_color_astronomy_more: Lasers, vision, color, astronomy + wax kale
maay_maay.trivia_records_quotes_safety_data_teac: Trivia · records · quotes · safety · data · teaching tips
maay_maay.snell_s_law_sandbox_predict_tir_disper: Snell's law sandbox — saadaali TIR + dispersion
maay_maay.refraction_snell_s_law_total_internal_: 🌊 Refraction — Snell's law + total internal reflection
maay_maay.lenses_converging_diverging_thin_lens_: 🔍 Lenses — converging + diverging, thin lens equation
maay_maay.angle_exceeds_critical_angle_no_light_: Angle wuu ka sarreeyaa critical angle. Iftiin ma gudbo — dhammaan dib buu u soo laabtaa. Waa saldhigga fiber optics, dhalaalka diamond, prism periscopes.
maay_maay.approaching_tir_boundary_refracted_ray: U soo dhowaanaya TIR boundary. Refracted ray wuxuu ku socdaa ku dhow surface-ka; transmitted intensity way hoosaysaa.
maay_maay.light_entering_denser_medium_n_n_refra: Iftiin gelaya denser medium (n₁ < n₂). Refracted ray wuxuu u leexdaa NORMAL-ka XAGGIISA — iftiin gaabis ah medium cufan.
maay_maay.light_entering_less_dense_medium_refra: Iftiin gelaya less-dense medium. Refracted ray wuxuu u leexdaa KA FOG normal-ka — iftiin dhaqso ah medium khafiif ah.
maay_maay.steep_angle_from_normal_much_energy_re: Angle qallafsan normal-ka. Energy badan ayaa dib u soo noqotaa (Fresnel wuu kacaa), wax yar ayaa gudba.
maay_maay.snell_s_law_inquiry_refraction_tir_dis: 🔬 Snell's Law Inquiry — Refraction, TIR, Dispersion
maay_maay.set_n_n_incidence_angle_and_wavelength: Deji n₁, n₂, incidence angle, iyo wavelength. Saadaali halka system-ku uga beddelo refraction ilaa TIR. Score ma jiro, reveal ma jiro.
maay_maay.your_hypothesis_where_exactly_does_tir: Hypothesis-kaaga (halka saxda ah ee TIR ka bilaabmo, iyo maxay diamond uga TIR-daa si ka xoog badan glass?)
maay_maay.e_g_diamond_has_critical_angle_24_vs_g: tusaale, diamond wuxuu leeyahay critical angle ~24° halka glass ~42°, sidaas any angle qallafsan wuu TIR-daa...
maay_maay.why_is_there_no_critical_angle_when_go: Maxaa critical angle uga maqan marka laga tago less-dense ilaa more-dense?
maay_maay.set_water_air_n_1_33_n_1_00_what_s_the: Deji water→air (n₁=1.33 n₂=1.00). Waa maxay critical angle? Maxay kalluunku u arkaan adduunka isku cufan cone kor ah?
maay_maay.in_a_rainbow_why_does_red_bend_less_th: Qaansaroobaadka, maxay casaanku uga leexdaa wax ka yar buluugga? Ku xidh wavelength slider.
maay_maay.how_does_a_prism_separate_white_light_: Sidee prism u kala saaraa white light haddii wavelengths oo dhan ay raacaan Snell's law isku mid ah?
maay_maay.i_can_explain_why_this_n_n_combination: Waan sharixi karaa sababta n₁/n₂/θ combination-kani u dhaliyo refraction state-kan.
maay_maay.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Inquiry widget — score ma jiro, reveal ma jiro, answer dump ma jiro. Dispersion model waa mid muujin ah (Cauchy-like first-order); dispersion curves dhab ah waa material-specific (Sellmeier coefficients).
